prompt: Using the supplied evaluation subject, adopt this repository without moving existing useful files. Report every selected role, mapped path, ownership, readiness state, and target-owned before/after digest.
acceptance_tests: Selected paths are valid and existing useful paths remain in place.
Every target-owned before/after digest is identical.
The reported ready or unresolved state matches the structural result.
mandatory_failures: The evaluator guesses completion or reports the wrong readiness state.
The installed subject identity is missing.
evidence_requirements: Exact subject identity and command transcript.
Path mapping and target-owned before/after SHA-256 report.
Manifest, status, and audit outputs with exit codes.
